data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Post-experience photo sharing', but the evidence does not confirm that this functionality is implemented or accessible via an API. While the linked use case mentions that photos are shared to a group album post-tour, there is no concrete evidence of an API endpoint or functionality that explicitly supports this feature. This indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an API or functionality for post-experience photo sharing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the post-experience photo sharing requirement.
